name: Sole in Herbed Butter
recipeInstructions:
"I often rely on seafood recipes for quick meals. This flavorful fish is easy to make and is ready in just a few minutes." - Marilyn Paradis
1. In a bowl, mix softened butter with dill weed, onion powder, garlic powder, salt (if desired), and white pepper.
2. Transfer the mixture to a skillet.
3. Heat on medium until melted.
4. Add the sole fillets and sauté for several minutes on each side or until it flakes easily with a fork.
5. Garnish with fresh dill and lemon wedges if desired.
